snippet.title: For The Rest Of My Life (Malay Version) Fattah Amin & Amira Othman cover
snippet.description:
Watch Fattah Amin & Amira Othman cover music video "Sepanjang hidup"  For The Rest Of My Life (Malay Version) Original artist by Maher Zain.

Artist : Fattah Amin & Amira Othman

Lyrics: Firas Chouchane, Maher Zain, Muad Muhammad & Bara Kherigi, Fuad Ko
Melody: Maher Zain & Muad Muhammad
Music Arrangement: Fuad Ko 
Music Video Concept : Fattah Amin
Musician : Fuad Ko, Mel Ramlan
Video Production : Afifi Zainan

Lyrics: 

[Verse 1]
Aku bersyukur kau di sini kasih 
Di kalbuku mengiringi
Dan padamu ingin ku sampaikan
Kau cahaya hati 
Dulu ku palingkan diri dari cinta
Hingga kau hadir membasuh segalanya 
inilah janjiku kepadamu 

[Chorus]
Sepanjang hidup bersamamu 
Kesetiaanku tulus untukmu
Hingga akhir waktu 
kaulah cintaku cintaku
Sepanjang hidup seiring waktu
Aku bersyukur atas hadirmu
Kini dan selamanya 
aku milikmu

[Verse 2]
kau anugerah Sang Maha Rahim
Semoga Allah berkati kita
Kekasih penguat jiwaku
Berdoa kau dan aku di Jannah
Ku temukan kekuatanku di sisimu
Kau hadir sempurnakan seluruh hidupku
inilah janjiku kepadamu

[Bridge]
bersamamu ku sedari inilah cinta
Tiada ragu dengarkanlah
Kidung cintaku yang abadi

[Chorus]
For the rest of my life
I`ll be with you
I`ll stay by your side honest and true
Till the end of my time
I`ll be loving you.loving you

Sepanjang hidup seiring waktu
Aku bersyukur atas hadirmu
Kini dan selamanya 
aku milikmu

Yakini hatiku….

snippet.title: Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 (FULL GAME)
snippet.description:
Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Full Gameplay Walkthrough with Thinknoodles of Poppy Playtime Chapter 5. This video is the full Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Ending, Broken Things. This is Poppy Playtime's biggest and most terrifying chapter yet, facing off against the Prototype and Huggy Wuggy. In this chilling new layer of the Playtime facility, you will encounter the tortured denizens living in the darkness. New hands permit new and creative ways to explore with a new Grabpack. The Prototype's face will finally be revealed. LWill you escape this new realm of shadows with your sanity intact, or will you succumb to the horrors within?
🍜 SUBSCRIBE - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UChd1FPXykD4pust3ljzq6hQ?sub_confirmation=1
👉 BECOME A MEMBER - https://www.youtube.com/thinknoodles/join
🤖 Discord: https://discord.gg/thinknoodles

Face off against the deadly puppetmaster behind the horrifying events of Playtime Co.

In the latest terrifying chapter of the Poppy Playtime saga (Chapter 5), you are propelled further into the gruesome depths of the factory, with Playtime’s security system Huggy Wuggy in hot pursuit. 

Abandoned by your only allies, your fight for survival gets all the more challenging as you race further into the abyss that is His domain. 

Here, shadows whisper, and the puppet master who lords over this realm pulls the strings of madness. Can you stand against evil and finally put an end to this nightmare? Every bloody move forward will test your resolve as you uncover secrets years in the making.

Features:

Stomach-churning terrors await you in this new section of the factory as you uncover the dark works hidden within The Prototype’s stomping grounds.

In this chilling new layer of the Playtime facility, you will encounter the tortured denizens living in the darkness. They may aid you in your quest to defeat The Prototype, but can they be trusted? 

Solve devious puzzles and overcome dangerous environmental obstacles with the power of new GrabPack tools and functionality.

As you reach the true rotten heart at the center of Playtime, you will discover some of the company’s gravest sins.

Will you escape this new realm of shadows with your sanity intact, or will you succumb to the horrors within?

Chapters 📚
00:00:00 Cinematic Opening & Chapter 5 Start
00:03:12 Huggy Wuggy Chase Tutorial Escape
00:30:28 Meeting Giblet
00:32:43 First Prototype Encounter
00:41:55 Bron & GrabPack 3.0
00:45:40 New Pressure Hand
00:57:56 Limon Easter Egg
01:09:16 Meeting Chum Chompkins
01:22:31 Magnetic Bracelets
01:36:09 Prototype Returns
01:53:47 Huggy Memory: “I’ve Always Been a Toy”
02:07:53 Blue VHS Tape
02:14:36 Playing As Huggy Wuggy
02:25:24 Entering Sweet Street
02:33:56 Meeting Lily Lovebraids
02:35:57 Finding Kissy Missy & Poppy
03:03:18 Prototype Face Reveal
03:30:23 Huggy & Kissy Reunion

snippet.title: AGY - LaLa Raya (Official Music Video) 4K
snippet.description:
#LaLaRaya #AGY 

Subscribe & Follow Us »»  http://bit.ly/2l4KXs9
♬Apple Music  »» https://bit.ly/4auQi3i
♬Spotify »» https://bit.ly/4cEaC3p

"LaLa Raya” ialah lagu Hari Raya terbaru AGY untuk tahun 2026 yang membawakan vibe Raya moden, ceria, catchy dan mudah sing-along, sambil mengangkat momen yang semua orang boleh relate seperti persiapan OOTD, suasana balik kampung dan kemeriahan berkumpul bersama keluarga. Dilancarkan bersama video muzik rasmi, karya ini bukan sekadar hiburan, tetapi satu refleksi tentang Raya hari ini: antara “content” dan rasa sebenar, sebelum akhirnya mengajak penonton kembali kepada perkara paling penting—hadir menikmati momen dan menghargai kebersamaan.

LALA RAYA | LIRIK

[Verse 1]
Saat Ketupat Dihidang
Bersama Wajik Dan Kuah Kacang
Melenggang Lenggang Eh Bergaya
Pukul Dua Ke Dapur Juga

[Verse 2]
Gema Suara Takbir Di Pagi Hari
Buka Lah Mata Siap OOTD
Semua Dah Ready Nak FYP
Siap Prac'ce Malam Ke Pagi

[Pre-Chorus]
Raya Raya Raya Raya Ya
I Sudah Ready Berbaju Raya
Raya Raya Raya Raya Ya
Selamat Hari Raya

[Chorus]
Duit Disampul Kuih Di Balang
Lagu Lama Forever Di Dendang
Berkunjungan Berkasih Sayang
Jauh Dekat Semua Kembali Pulang

[Verse 3]
Lampu Pelita Terang Berseri
Berdentam Dentum Bunga Api
Dengan Doa Kita Mulakan
Samudera Bahagia

[Post Chorus]
Raya Raya Raya
Raya Raya Raya
Lala Lala Lala Raya Raya
Meriah Raya Bersama
Raya Raya Raya
Selamat Hari Raya

[Rap]
Selamat Be Be Berhari Raya
Meriahnya Bersama Keluarga
Eh Adik Abang Kakak Semuanya
Sedondon Kita Semua Bergaya
Paklong Sibuk Eh Tolong Tolong
Merah Mak Ngah Eh Berkebarong
Yang Lain Sibuk Menggosok Tudung
Its Hari Raya Lets Sing It Along

[Ulang Post Chorus]

snippet.title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
For dust you are. #LeeCroninsTheMummy only in theaters April 17.

Hot off the record-setting resurrection of EVIL DEAD RISE, writer/director Lee Cronin turns to one of the most iconic horror stories of all time with an audacious and twisted retelling: LEE CRONIN’S THE MUMMY.

The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace— eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as what should be a joyful reunion turns into a living nightmare.

The film stars Jack Reynor, Laia Costa, May Calamawy, Natalie Grace, with Veronica Falcón. The film is written and directed by Cronin, and produced by James Wan, Jason Blum and John Keville. The executive producers are Michael Clear, Judson Scott, Macdara Kelleher and Lee Cronin.

Cronin is supported behind the camera by a team of sterling film artisans, including director of photography Dave Garbett, production designer Nick Bassett, editor Bryan Shaw, costume designer Joanna Eatwell, music by Stephen McKeon and casting by Terri Taylor and Sarah Domeier Lindo.

New Line Cinema, Atomic Monster and Blumhouse Present, A Wicked/Good Production, A Lee Cronin Film: LEE CRONIN’S THE MUMMY. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on April 17, 2026, and internationally beginning 15 April 2026.

snippet.title: DIOR大穎 - 人的這一生 - (Official MV) 電影《老婆，我愛你！》插曲
snippet.description:
那就讓這一切的發生 帶著我
讓我成為 更好的人✨


《人的這一生》
演唱：DIOR大穎
作詞：DIOR大穎、大牛
作曲：DIOR大穎、大牛

就走到這裡 剩我一個人
我不會怪你 丟下我 奔向更好的人
如果她可以 帶你飛向更好的旅程
我想我 可以學著忘記

需要花多長時間 看清一個人
還要花多少時間 反覆的疑問
人總不能在過去沉淪

人的這一生 要經歷過多少次的天真
要用多少次的笨 多少的青春
來換一個 更好的人

我們這一生 難道不能平凡而單純
用盡了這一生的運氣 
能不能換來一個 平庸的人生

不斷的欺騙自己 你是對的人
眼看著所有回憶 慢慢變陌生
可為什麼 我還是能為你奮不顧身 

人的這一生 要經歷過多少次的天真
要用多少次的笨 多少的青春
來換一個 更好的人

我們這一生 難道不能平凡而單純
用盡了這餘生的運氣
能不能換來一個 對的人

用盡一身的力氣 愛到忘記我自己  
沒關係  我會放下你

我 這一生 還會不會遇見更愛我的人
保護我的單純  守護我的天真
能給我足夠的安穩

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] The Sun From Another Star อาทิตย์ดาวตก | STUDIO WABI SABI
snippet.description:
FOUREVER YOU PART 2 | THE SUN FROM ANOTHER STAR

ดาวตกเกิดมาพร้อมพลังพิเศษที่สามารถอ่านความรู้สึก อ่านชะตา รวมทั้งสื่อสารกับวิญญาณได้ ชีวิตนักศึกษาอันแสนเรียบง่ายของเขาดูจะผ่านพ้นไปได้ด้วยดีจนกระทั่งย้ายไปอยู่คอนโดใหม่ที่ขึ้นชื่อว่าผีดุ นอกจากจะมีวิญญาณมาป่วนไม่ขาดสายแล้ว ดาวตกยังต้องรับมือกับอาทิตย์ พี่หมอข้างห้องที่ชอบหาเรื่องมาให้ปวดหัวอยู่ตลอด นั่นจึงเป็นจุดเริ่มต้นที่ทำให้ชีวิตอันสงบสุขของดาวตกได้เปลี่ยนไปตลอดกาล

ทุกวันพุธ เวลา 20.30 น. ทางช่อง GMM25 
และเวอร์ชัน UNCUT บนแอป WeTV ที่เดียวเท่านั้น 
เริ่มตอนแรก 4 มีนาคมนี้

เงิน อนุภาษ เหลืองสดใส
โอ๊ต ธาราธร พุ่มโพธิงาม
พาย ศรัณวุฒิ นิตยสุทธิ
กอล์ฟ พสธร เลิศสถิตย์วงศ์
บีเวอร์ พรรษพล เจนสรรพกิจกุล
ต้นหลิว เมธาพัฒน์ ฉิมกุล
ปอนด์ พลวิชญ์ เกตุประภากร
เอิร์ธ กัษมนณัฏฐ์ นามวิโรจน์

snippet.title: Untitled John Wick Game - Announce Trailer | PS5 Games
snippet.description:
Created in collaboration between Saber, Lionsgate, and franchise director Chad Stahelski, the new “Untitled John Wick Game” will feature an original script set in the John Wick timeline, expanding on the franchise’s intricate lore with familiar characters fans already know, as well as completely new ones. Saber’s design will be faithful to the unique style and signature elements of the series, including a distinct gun fu combat system, jaw-dropping camerawork, immersive driving experiences, and a variety of memorable environments, all crafted to make players feel like they are in a John Wick movie, playing the role of John Wick himself.

#ps5 #ps5games #stateofplay #johnwick

Intro 
Singgah-singgah rumah 20 simpang 
Kutip-kutip duit raya tiga kupang 
Mari dengar mari akak adik abang 
Lagu raya rumah 20 simpang

V1 
Berkali-kali ku cuba hubungi 
Eh, engkau di mana 
Yang mama pesan sudahkah kau beli 
Hoi, jangan terlupa

Pre-cho 
Nasi impit, lontong kuah kacang 
Semua dah dihidang 
Jemput makan adik abang 
Ada soto, bareng paru berlado 
Kaut sambal jawo 
Kabeh ayo (siji, loro, telu, papat)

Chorus 
Singgah-singgah rumah 20 simpang 
Kutip-kutip duit raya tiga kupang 
Balik kampung rindu sama papa mama 
Lama tak jumpa (hoi), nak balik raya (hey)

V2 
Semua cantik jalan tergedek beraya ke rumah nenek 
Riuh rendah sekampung, bunyi mercun pom pom pom 
Terbakar kain dah melopong 
Pre-cho 
Di pagi raya tetamu tiba 
Bermaafan lupakan sengketa, semua

Chorus 2 
Singgah-singgah rumah 20 simpang 
Kutip-kutip duit raya tiga kupang 
Balik kampung rindu sama papa mama 
Lama tak jumpa (hoi), nak balik raya (hey) 
Baju raya dalam bonet lima pasang 
Ambik-ambik hai pilih satu seorang 
Jangan lupa eh sekali kuih raya 
Kita tak sabar (hoi), nak balik raya (hey)

Bridge 
Hai Ojen, penat dah berpusing, 
Cari-cari rumah sampai pening, 
Angguk-angguk geleng-geleng 
Hai Ojen, penat dah berpusing, 
Dari Banting sampai Tanjung Keling 
Hai minyak pun dah kering

*Pre-cho

*Chorus 2 
Singgah-menyinggah pusing ke simpang-menyimpang 
Cari rumah tak nampak bayang 
Tipu-tertipu liku-berliku berlagu 
Lagu raya 20 simpang 
Pusing-pusing baru sampai pagi raya 
Kita tak sabar (hoi), Nak sambut raya (hey) 
Ada macam, makan-makan jawo 
Kabeh ayo ayo 
Slamat hari rayo

snippet.title: Little Mix - Secret Love Song (Lyrics) ft. Jason Derulo
snippet.description:
🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿Listen: Little Mix - Secret Love Song (Lyrics) ft. Jason Derulo

🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿Lyrics:

[Intro: Jesy, Jade]
When you hold me in the street
And you kiss me on the dance floor
I wish that it could be like that
Why can't it be like that?
'Cause I'm yours

[Verse 1: Jade, Jesy]
We keep behind closed doors
Every time I see you, I die a little more
Stolen moments that we steal as the curtain falls
It'll never be enough
It's obvious you're meant for me
Every piece of you, it just fits perfectly
Every second, every thought, I'm in so deep
But I'll never show it on my face

[Pre-Chorus: Jesy]
But we know this
We got a love that is hopeless

[Chorus: Perrie]
Why can't you hold me in the street?
Why can't I kiss you on the dance floor?
I wish that it could be like that
Why can't we be like that?
'Cause I'm yours 

[Verse 2: Jason Derulo]
When you're with him, do you call his name
Like you do when you're with me? Does it feel the same?
Would you leave if I was ready to settle down?
Or would you play it safe and stay?

[Pre-Chorus: Jason Derulo]
Girl, you know this
We got a love that is hopeless

[Chorus: Perrie & Jason Derulo, Jason Derulo]
Why can't you hold me in the street?
Why can't I kiss you on the dance floor? (I wish)
I wish that it could be like that
Why can't we be like that?
'Cause I'm yours

[Bridge: Jason Derulo, Leigh-Anne, Leigh-Anne & Jason Derulo]
And nobody knows I'm in love with someone's baby
I don't wanna hide us away
Tell the world about the love we making
I'm living for that day, someday

[Breakdown: Jason Derulo, Jesy]
Why can't I hold you in the street?
Why can't I kiss you on the dance floor?
I wish that we could be like that
Why can't we be like that?
'Cause I'm yours, I'm yours

[Chorus: Leigh-Anne, Jason Derulo, Perrie, Perrie & Jason Derulo]
Oh, why can't you hold me in the street? (Hold me in the street)
Why can't I kiss you on the dance floor? (You on the dance floor)
I wish that it could be like that (I wish)
Why can't it be like that? (I wish)
'Cause I'm yours ('Cause I'm yours)
Why can't I say that I'm in love? (I'm in love)
I wanna shout it from the rooftops (Shout it from the rooftops)
I wish that it could be like that (I wish)
Why can't we be like that?
'Cause I'm yours

[Outro: Jade]
Why can't we be like that?
Wish we could be like that
